posts.hook: You blink 66% less when staring at a screen. Your eyes are drying out right now.
posts.caption:
Normal blink rate: 15–20 times per minute.
On screens: 5–7 blinks per minute.

That's a 66% reduction.

Dry, irritated eyes = the #1 complaint of remote workers.

The fix is embarrassingly simple: blink deliberately. 5× right now.

Free blink exercise guide: axeo.vision

posts.hook: Your eyes need a weekend too. Here's a 3-step Friday reset.
posts.caption:
5 days of screens. Your ciliary muscle has been contracted since Monday.

Friday reset routine (10 minutes):

1. Palming (2 min) — warm your palms, cup over closed eyes
2. Near-far shift (3 min) — focus finger close, then something far across the room
3. Figure-8 tracking (2 min) — trace a slow figure-8 in the air with your eyes

Guided version: axeo.vision/exercise

#EyeExercise #WeekendReset #Axeo #AxeoVision #EyeHealth #DigitalDetox #HealthTok

posts.hook: The blink exercise — 60 seconds that actually fix dry eye.
posts.caption:
Most people treat dry eye with drops.

The root cause: you're not blinking completely.

The Blinking Reset (optometrist-recommended):
1. Close eyes gently — 1 second
2. Squeeze lightly — 1 second
3. Open slowly — 1 second
4. Repeat 10× every hour

This reactivates your meibomian glands (the oil layer of your tear film).

Free guided blink exercise on axeo.vision

#DryEye #BlinkExercise #EyeHealth #Axeo #AxeoVision #Optometrist #DigitalEyeStrain

posts.hook: The blink crisis: you blink 66% less on screens. Your eyes are running on empty.
posts.caption:
Normal: 15–20 blinks/minute.
On screens: 5–7 blinks/minute.

Each blink recoats your eye in tear film.
Fewer blinks = faster evaporation = dry, strained eyes.

The fix: deliberate blinking.
Every hour: close → squeeze → open. 10 reps.

axeo.vision has a guided version.
posts.visual_notes: Infographic: blink rate comparison chart. Tear film diagram. Clean Axeo brand design.

posts.hook: Remote work gave us flexibility. It also gave us an eye health crisis.
posts.caption:
After 5 years of widespread remote work, we're seeing a predictable consequence:

→ 58% of remote workers report chronic eye strain (vs 38% pre-2020)
→ Average screen time jumped from 7h to 11h/day
→ Near-work without breaks is the #1 driver of myopia progression in adults

Three changes that take under 5 minutes per hour:

1. 20-20-20 rule (every 20 min, look 20 feet away for 20 sec)
2. Deliberate blinking reset (10 complete blinks per hour)
3. One minute of palming before every meeting

Companies investing in employee eye health see measurable drops in reported headaches and focus issues within 30 days.

Axeo provides guided eye exercises for teams: axeo.vision

#RemoteWork #EmployeeWellness #EyeHealth #DigitalWellbeing #Productivity
